subject: ode to the legal lady's of swap and a sempra energy credit w/s

emails.subject: Ode to the Legal Lady's of Swap and a Sempra Energy Credit W/S
emails.subject_base: Ode to the Legal Lady's of Swap and a Sempra Energy Credit W/S
emails.body: Ode to the Legal Lady's of Swap and a Sempra Energy Credit W/S Dear Legal Lady's I would like to further reinstate my status of favorite Credit Person, I know as of late my status had been slipping and I must confess I have no one to blame but myself. I want you to know that after a lot of deep thought and pondering of my potential status downgrade, I have resolved myself to pull from deep inside and work to maintain my status. Although my mates in credit have provided some strong competition to remove me from favorite credit status, I am here to tell you that I am committed 150% to remain as your favorite credit person!!!!! Yours Truly, Russell Now, that being said, my commitment is demonstrated by the submittance of the Sempra Energy Solutions Credit Worksheet. Thanks again, Russell
